physicalDetails.detail: An older bearded man wearing a factor's ring, laid out too neatly on the rear-office floor after the room around him had been cleaned.

emotionalStateAtChapterEnd.state: Dead; the body functions as evidence rather than a continuing emotional presence.

decisionsThisChapter.detail: No on-page decisions survive; whatever he knew died with him before the party arrived.

abilitiesDemonstrated.ability: His position and ring mark him as someone with authority over route books and freight records at Millbrook Spur.

bodyLanguagePatterns.detail: The body is wrong in its neatness: hands set at his sides, room swept, death disguised to look ordinary from the doorway.

knowledge.detail: He died three to four days before discovery from the same quiet necromantic touch already seen elsewhere in the operation.
His death proves the cleaners will silence logistics personnel as precisely as village watchers.

arc.currentPosition: A local dead witness whose existence broadens the pattern of targeted silencing inside the grain network.
